S.FORM: Erick Barkley Erick Barkley Erick Barkley nalecuhan i Queens, New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Erick Barkley i 2000 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu Portland Trail Blazers putiput. 2 bulad 21 demiad, 1978 a mihca, Erick Barkley, miunduay.
S.PHON: …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i *u…ô…ôns, n…ôw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu portr~…æand trair~…æ br~…æaz…ôrs putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Erick Barkley Erick Barkley Erick Barkley nalecuhan i Queens, New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Erick Barkley i 2000 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 28, namapili' tu nu Portland Trail Blazers putiput. 2 bulad 21 demiad, 1978 a mihca, Erick Barkley, miunduay.
S.PHON: …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i *u…ô…ôns, n…ôw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu portr~…æand trair~…æ br~…æaz…ôrs putiput. * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, …ôri ¶k barkr~…æ…ô, miunduaj.
